name: NFED — Natural Foveal/Visual Encoding fMRI
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds005047) of 5 participants viewing large numbers of natural scenes during fMRI. A deep per-subject resource for building and testing visual encoding models on naturalistic imagery.
citation: Chen Z, et al. (2024). A large-scale fMRI dataset for human visual encoding of natural scenes. Scientific Data, 11, 1209.
